rollingWindow.note: Anchored weekly walk-forward (refit each week on prior data only, 5-day label purge). Compared against the 6-fold baseline.

windowComparison.note: Anchored weekly scheme with capped look-backs, all aligned to the same evaluation weeks. 'volatility' is annualised weekly dispersion (lower = steadier).

regimeModels.note: Bull/bear specialists routed by the 200d-SMA regime, same expanding folds as the general model. Honest test: ship the ensemble only if it wins.
regimeModels.verdict: Regime ensemble Sharpe 0.95 vs general 1.19 — no improvement; general model stays champion.

ood.note: Trained on data before 2023 and frozen; evaluated untouched on 2023+. eraDrift is per-feature PSI between the two eras (how hard the test was).

confidence.note: Equal-weight vs conviction-weighted BUY basket, plus BUY-probability calibration (reliability curve + Brier). Frictionless, OOS.

onlineLearning.note: Weekly leakage-purged predictions; only the refit frequency varies. Shows the compute (refits) vs OOS Sharpe trade-off for a live cadence.
